commands.name: extract

options.name: --exit-on-duplicate-key
options.description:
Exit with error code 1 when duplicate translation keys
are found (useful for CI pipelines)

options.name: --format
options.description:
Export format: i18next (default, Crowdin i18next
JSON), po (GNU Gettext with source refs), json (full-fidelity debug)

options.name: --locale
options.description:
Filter to specific locales. Repeatable (-l da -l
es-MX). Omit to include all discovered locales

options.name: --on-duplicate-key
options.description:
Strategy for duplicate translation keys (same key,
different source text). 'first' (default) keeps the first-seen source
text. 'skip' omits the key entirely

options.name: --output
options.description:
Output path: a file (e.g. out.po) or directory (e.g.
./translations). Auto-detected via extension. Omit to write to stdout

options.name: --path-style
options.description:
Path style for source references. 'relative'
(default) emits paths relative to the project root. 'absolute'
preserves full filesystem paths

options.name: --source-only
options.description:
Export source-language entries only; skip per-locale
translations

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Print per-project scanning progress to stderr

arguments.name: paths
arguments.description:
Directories or .csproj files to scan. Repeatable. 
Defaults to current directory

commands.description:
Scan Blazor projects for IStringLocalizer usage, extract 
source strings, and export to a translation file (i18next JSON, PO, or generic 
JSON).

commands.name: inspect

options.name: --json
options.description:
Output raw JSON to stdout instead of rendered tables.
Auto-enabled when stdout is piped

options.name: --locale
options.description:
Filter to specific locales. Repeatable (-l da -l
es-MX). Omit to include all discovered locales

options.name: --path-style
options.description:
Path style for source references. 'relative'
(default) emits paths relative to the project root. 'absolute'
preserves full filesystem paths

options.name: --source-only
options.description:
Export source-language entries only; skip per-locale
translations

arguments.name: paths
arguments.description:
Directories or .csproj files to scan. Repeatable. 
Defaults to current directory

commands.description:
Show all detected IStringLocalizer calls and the resulting
translation entries. Useful for debugging what the scanner sees before 
exporting.
